results.pred_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM identity.users
SELECT count(*) FROM catalog.products WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT code FROM geo.currencies
SELECT count(*) FROM sales.orders WHERE status = 'refunded'
SELECT avg(grand_total) FROM sales.orders
SELECT count(*) FROM support.tickets WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders
SELECT sum(amount) FROM billing.payments WHERE status = 'captured'
SELECT count(*) FROM catalog.products WHERE status = 'archived'
SELECT count(*) FROM billing.subscriptions WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT count(*) FROM geo.countries WHERE continent = 'Europe'
SELECT avg(employee_count) FROM crm.accounts
SELECT count(*) FROM identity.users
SELECT count(*) FROM support.tickets WHERE status = 'open'
SELECT count(*) FROM billing.invoices WHERE status = 'past_due'
SELECT p.name AS product, b.name AS brand FROM catalog.products p JOIN catalog.brands b ON b.id = p.brand_id
SELECT r.rating, p.name FROM catalog.product_reviews r JOIN catalog.products p ON p.id = r.product_id
SELECT s.id, pl.name FROM billing.subscriptions s JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id
SELECT o.id, u.email FROM sales.orders o JOIN identity.users u ON u.id = o.user_id
SELECT p.id, p.name FROM catalog.products p LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.id IS NULL
SELECT count(*) FROM billing.subscriptions s JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id WHERE pl.code = 'pro' AND s.status = 'active'
SELECT currency_code, sum(grand_total) AS revenue FROM sales.orders GROUP BY currency_code
SELECT tenant_id, count(*) FROM sales.orders GROUP BY tenant_id
SELECT product_id, avg(rating) AS avg_rating FROM catalog.product_reviews GROUP BY product_id HAVING avg(rating) > 4
SELECT u.id, u.email, count(o.id) AS n FROM identity.users u JOIN sales.orders o ON o.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.email HAVING count(o.id) > 3
SELECT c.name AS country, sum(o.grand_total) AS revenue FROM sales.orders o JOIN geo.addresses a ON a.id = o.shipping_address_id JOIN geo.countries c ON c.id = a.country_id GROUP BY c.name
SELECT pv.product_id, sum(oi.quantity) AS units FROM sales.order_items oi JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON pv.id = oi.product_variant_id GROUP BY pv.product_id ORDER BY units DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM identity.users u JOIN sales.orders o ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN billing.payments p ON p.order_id = o.id WHERE p.status = 'refunded'
SELECT count(DISTINCT a.user_id) FROM geo.addresses a JOIN geo.countries c ON c.id = a.country_id WHERE c.name = 'Germany'
SELECT pl.code, count(*) FROM billing.subscriptions s JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id WHERE s.status = 'active' GROUP BY pl.code
SELECT date_trunc('month', placed_at) AS month, count(*) AS orders FROM sales.orders WHERE placed_at >= date_trunc('month', DATE '2026-06-01') - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY 1
SELECT tenant_id, sum(grand_total) AS revenue, rank() OVER (ORDER BY sum(grand_total) DESC) AS rnk FROM sales.orders GROUP BY tenant_id ORDER BY revenue DESC
SELECT avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days FROM support.tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT count(*) FROM sales.orders o JOIN identity.users u ON u.id = o.user_id AND u.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
SELECT c.name, count(p.id) AS n FROM catalog.categories c JOIN catalog.products p ON p.primary_category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT sum(grand_total) FROM sales.orders WHERE currency_code = 'EUR'
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled')::numeric / count(*) FROM sales.orders
SELECT id, name FROM crm.accounts WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT pl.code, avg(o.grand_total) AS aov FROM sales.orders o JOIN identity.users u ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN billing.subscriptions s ON s.user_id = u.id JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id GROUP BY pl.code
SELECT status, count(*) FROM billing.invoices GROUP BY status
SELECT count(*) FROM analytics.web_sessions WHERE is_bounce = true
SELECT count(*) FROM pricing.coupons WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT sum(amount) FROM billing.payment_refunds WHERE status = 'succeeded'
SELECT count(*) FROM audit.audit_log WHERE action = 'delete'
SELECT avg(score) FROM support.csat_responses
SELECT count(*) FROM crm.opportunities WHERE is_won = true
SELECT count(*) FROM billing.subscriptions WHERE status = 'canceled'
SELECT count(*) FROM marketing.campaigns WHERE status = 'sent'
SELECT count(*) FROM inventory.stock_movements WHERE kind = 'shipment'
SELECT count(*) FROM crm.leads WHERE status = 'converted'
SELECT count(*) FROM comms.webhook_deliveries WHERE status = 'failed'
SELECT status, count(*) FROM comms.notifications GROUP BY status
SELECT action, count(*) FROM audit.audit_log GROUP BY action
SELECT date_trunc('month', occurred_at) AS month, count(*) AS events FROM analytics.events GROUP BY 1
SELECT status, count(*) FROM ops.job_runs GROUP BY status
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'bounced')::numeric / count(*) FROM marketing.campaign_messages
SELECT currency_code, sum(total) AS invoiced FROM billing.invoices GROUP BY currency_code
SELECT tenant_id, count(*) FROM crm.opportunities WHERE is_closed = false GROUP BY tenant_id
SELECT n.id, u.email FROM comms.notifications n JOIN identity.users u ON u.id = n.user_id
SELECT o.name, p.name AS pipeline FROM crm.opportunities o JOIN crm.pipelines p ON p.id = o.pipeline_id
SELECT count(*) FROM billing.payment_refunds r JOIN billing.payments p ON p.id = r.payment_id WHERE p.status = 'captured'
SELECT c.id, c.code FROM pricing.coupons c LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions r ON r.coupon_id = c.id WHERE r.id IS NULL
SELECT c.code, sum(r.discount_amount) AS redeemed FROM pricing.coupon_redemptions r JOIN pricing.coupons c ON c.id = r.coupon_id GROUP BY c.code
SELECT rated_agent_id, avg(score) AS avg_score FROM support.csat_responses WHERE rated_agent_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rated_agent_id HAVING avg(score) < 3
SELECT c.name, count(*) AS sends FROM marketing.campaigns c JOIN marketing.campaign_messages m ON m.campaign_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name HAVING count(*) > 100

SELECT p.name, count(*) AS won, rank() OVER (ORDER BY count(*) DESC) AS rnk FROM crm.opportunities o JOIN crm.pipelines p ON p.id = o.pipeline_id WHERE o.is_won = true GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY won DESC

WITH monthly AS (  SELECT date_trunc('month', occurred_at) AS month, sum(amount) AS debit   FROM billing.ledger_entries WHERE direction = 'debit' GROUP BY 1) SELECT month, debit, sum(debit) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total FROM monthly ORDER BY month
SELECT event_name, count(*) AS n FROM analytics.events GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT sa.display_name, avg(cr.score) AS avg_score FROM support.csat_responses cr JOIN support.support_agents sa ON sa.id = cr.rated_agent_id GROUP BY sa.display_name

SELECT w.name, count(*) AS movements FROM inventory.stock_movements m JOIN inventory.stock_locations l ON l.id = m.stock_location_id JOIN inventory.warehouses w ON w.id = l.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.name
SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM identity.users u JOIN marketing.campaign_messages m ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sales.orders o ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE m.opened_at IS NOT NULL AND o.id IS NULL

SELECT pl.code, sum(i.total) AS invoiced FROM billing.invoices i JOIN billing.subscriptions s ON s.id = i.subscription_id JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id WHERE i.status = 'paid' GROUP BY pl.code

SELECT c.name AS country, sum(r.amount) AS refunded FROM billing.payment_refunds r JOIN billing.payments p ON p.id = r.payment_id JOIN sales.orders o ON o.id = p.order_id JOIN geo.addresses a ON a.id = o.shipping_address_id JOIN geo.countries c ON c.id = a.country_id WHERE r.status = 'succeeded' GROUP BY c.name
SELECT count(*) FROM comms.notifications n JOIN identity.users u ON u.id = n.user_id AND u.tenant_id = n.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM identity.users u JOIN billing.subscriptions s ON s.user_id = u.id JOIN billing.plans pl ON pl.id = s.plan_id JOIN support.tickets t ON t.requester_user_id = u.id WHERE s.status = 'active' AND pl.code = 'enterprise'
SELECT count(*) FROM sales.carts WHERE status = 'abandoned'
SELECT count(*) FROM sales.fulfillments WHERE status = 'delivered'
SELECT count(*) FROM catalog.product_variants WHERE is_active = true
SELECT count(*) FROM inventory.purchase_orders WHERE status = 'received'
SELECT count(*) FROM identity.login_attempts WHERE succeeded = false
SELECT count(*) FROM sales.returns WHERE status = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) FROM comms.email_log WHERE status = 'failed'
SELECT avg(duration_seconds) FROM analytics.page_views
SELECT gateway, sum(amount) AS captured FROM billing.payments WHERE status = 'captured' GROUP BY gateway
SELECT status, count(*) FROM sales.orders GROUP BY status
SELECT EXTRACT(hour FROM occurred_at) AS hr, count(*) AS n FROM analytics.events GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::numeric / count(*) FROM comms.email_log
SELECT t.id, count(*) AS msgs FROM support.tickets t JOIN support.ticket_messages m ON m.ticket_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id HAVING count(*) >= 8
SELECT order_id, sum(line_total) AS total FROM sales.order_items GROUP BY order_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT s.tracking_number, o.order_number FROM sales.shipments s JOIN sales.fulfillments f ON f.id = s.fulfillment_id JOIN sales.orders o ON o.id = f.order_id WHERE s.delivered_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT ct.first_name, ct.last_name, a.name AS account FROM crm.contacts ct JOIN crm.accounts a ON a.id = ct.account_id
SELECT pm.kind, count(*) AS n FROM billing.payments p JOIN billing.payment_methods pm ON pm.id = p.payment_method_id WHERE p.status = 'captured' GROUP BY pm.kind

SELECT b.name AS brand, sum(oi.quantity) AS units FROM sales.order_items oi JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON pv.id = oi.product_variant_id JOIN catalog.products p ON p.id = pv.product_id JOIN catalog.brands b ON b.id = p.brand_id GROUP BY b.name
SELECT w.name, count(*) AS n FROM sales.fulfillments f JOIN inventory.warehouses w ON w.id = f.warehouse_id WHERE f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered') GROUP BY w.name ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT o.currency_code, sum(r.amount) AS refunded FROM billing.payment_refunds r JOIN billing.payments p ON p.id = r.payment_id JOIN sales.orders o ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE r.status = 'succeeded' GROUP BY o.currency_code
SELECT user_id, placed_at, grand_total, sum(grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY placed_at) AS running FROM sales.orders ORDER BY user_id, placed_at LIMIT 50

WITH m AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', placed_at) AS month, count(*) AS orders FROM sales.orders GROUP BY 1) SELECT month, orders, orders - lag(orders) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM m ORDER BY month
SELECT owner_user_id, count(*) AS won FROM crm.opportunities WHERE is_won = true GROUP BY owner_user_id ORDER BY won DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT count(*) FROM identity.users u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM identity.login_attempts la WHERE la.user_id = u.id AND la.succeeded = true)
SELECT p.name, count(*) AS reviews FROM catalog.product_reviews r JOIN catalog.products p ON p.id = r.product_id WHERE r.is_approved = true GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY reviews DESC LIMIT 10
